mapper.select: SELECT id, template_code, template_name, category, description, process_key, config_json, usage_count, is_starter, del_flag, create_by, create_time, remark FROM lc_biz_template WHERE id = #{id} AND del_flag = '0'

SELECT id, template_code, template_name, category, description, process_key, config_json, usage_count, is_starter, del_flag, create_by, create_time, remark FROM lc_biz_template WHERE template_code = #{templateCode} AND del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO lc_biz_template (template_code, template_name, category, description, thumbnail, process_key, config_json, usage_count, is_starter, del_flag, create_by, create_time, remark) VALUES (#{templateCode}, #{templateName}, #{category}, #{description}, #{thumbnail}, #{processKey}, #{configJson}, 0, #{isStarter}, '0', #{createBy}, NOW(), #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE lc_biz_template SET usage_count = usage_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE lc_biz_template SET del_flag = '2' WHERE id IN #{id}
